Referensi API

Endpoint REST, skema autentikasi, dan contoh curl.

Beranda | Panduan setup | Referensi API | Ringkasan XML | Postman

Konvensi

Base URL contoh: http://localhost:8080. Body permintaan JSON memakai header Content-Type: application/json.

Koleksi Postman (import & uji)

Endpoint JSON mengikuti skema koleksi Postman v2.1. Isi sudah mencakup variabel baseUrl, jwtToken (diisi otomatis setelah Auth → Login sukses), dan Basic Auth untuk rute internal.

Unduh findings-api.postman_collection.json

Langkah di Postman

  1. Import → Upload Files atau Link → masukkan URL: http://localhost:8080/docs/postman-collection.json (sesuaikan host/port).
  2. Bila perlu, ubah variabel koleksi baseUrl, basicUser, basicPassword, demoEmail / demoPassword.
  3. Jalankan Auth → Register (sekali), lalu Auth → Login — token tersimpan ke jwtToken.
  4. Jalankan request di folder JWT dan Internal.

Publik

MetodePathAuthKeterangan
GET /health — Liveness. Respons: {"status":"ok"}
GET /ready — Readiness (cek DB). 200 jika DB OK, 503 jika tidak.
GET /api/v1/public/info — Info service: nama & versi dari env.

Autentikasi pengguna (JWT)

MetodePathAuthBody / catatan
POST /api/v1/auth/register — {"email":"string","password":"string"} — password minimal 8 karakter.
POST /api/v1/auth/login — {"email":"string","password":"string"} — respons berisi token (Bearer).
GET /api/v1/me Bearer JWT Header: Authorization: Bearer <token>
GET /api/v1/findings Bearer JWT Daftar temuan milik user yang login.
POST /api/v1/findings Bearer JWT {"title":"string","severity":"string","status":"string"} — status opsional (default open).

Internal (HTTP Basic Auth)

Kredensial dari BASIC_AUTH_USER dan BASIC_AUTH_PASSWORD. Jika salah satu kosong, rute internal mengembalikan 503.

MetodePathAuthKeterangan
GET /internal/metrics Basic Contoh metrik placeholder.
POST /internal/cache/purge Basic Simulasi purge cache.

Contoh curl

curl -s http://localhost:8080/health
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/v1/auth/register \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"email":"demo@example.com","password":"password123"}'
TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/v1/auth/login \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"email":"demo@example.com","password":"password123"}' | jq -r .token)
curl -s http://localhost:8080/api/v1/me -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"
curl -s -u "admin:admin" http://localhost:8080/internal/metrics

Rute dokumentasi web

MetodePathIsi
GET/Redirect ke /docs
GET/docsBeranda dokumentasi
GET/docs/guidePanduan setup proyek
GET/docs/apiReferensi API
GET/docs/api-overview.xmlRingkasan endpoint (XML)
GET/docs/postman-collection.jsonKoleksi Postman v2.1 (Content-Disposition: attachment)
← Panduan setup · Technical Assessment Findings API
